name: Barbecue Sauce (Microwave)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Firm packed dark brown sugar
a few drops Tabasco sauce, to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. Place butter, onion, garlic, and green pepper in a deep, 1 1/2-quart heat-resistant, non-metallic casserole and heat in Microwave Oven for 3 minutes or until tender. Stir occasionally.
2. Add remaining ingredients; stir well to combine.
3. Heat, uncovered, in Microwave Oven for 2 minutes or until sauce bubbles. Serve over meat or poultry. Makes 2 1/4 cups
